summary: Completed frontend testing of enhanced AgentsDashboard component. All 8 requested features verified working correctly: stats cards with gradients display, performance badges show for each agent, search and filter functionality works, add agent dialog opens/closes, view agent details shows correct info, add payment dialog works, agent transactions dialog loads, sort options work correctly.

issues: Minor: Dialog accessibility warning - 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' logged in console

critical_code_review_comments: AgentsDashboard.js is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
Performance badge component correctly categorizes agents (ممتاز >=80, جيد >=60, متوسط >=40, ضعيف <40)
Mini chart component renders SVG sparklines for visual data representation
All dialogs properly use data from selected agent state
Filter and sort functionality uses useMemo for optimized re-renders
API calls use proper authorization headers with localStorage token
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested with existing agent 'wakil'
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentsDashboard component fully functional. Existing agent 'wakil' has: 1 subscriber, 10% commission, 500 DZD total earnings, -4,500 DZD balance, 56% performance score (medium). All CRUD dialogs working.

stats_cards_display.details: 4 gradient cards showing: Total Agents (1), Total Subscribers (1), Total Commissions (500 DZD), Total Debt (4,500 DZD)

performance_score_badges.details: PerformanceBadge component shows 'متوسط' (medium/amber) badge for agent with 56% score

search_and_filter.details: Search input filters by name/email/phone, Status filter dropdown (all/active/inactive/debt/top), Sort dropdown works

add_agent_dialog.details: Dialog opens with form fields: name, email, password, phone, company, address, commission %, fixed commission, debt limit, notes

view_agent_details_dialog.details: Shows agent profile header with avatar, stats grid (56% performance, -4500 balance, 500 commissions, 1 subscriber), contact info

add_payment_dialog.details: Shows current balance, transaction type dropdown (payment/commission/refund/deduction), amount, description, notes

agent_transactions_dialog.details: Table headers: النوع, المبلغ, الوصف, الرصيد بعدها, التاريخ - loads transactions for selected agent

sort_options.details: Sort by dropdown (subscribers/commissions/balance/performance/date), sort order toggle (asc/desc)

console_warnings: React Hook useEffect missing dependency warnings (non-critical)
